title: StickCraft Gamepad Edition
description:
A Fully Controller Supported Modpack. 

Thats right play modded minecraft with full controller support kick back on the sofa or lay in bed and jump in
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c597b7f7b1e75da7476a65df2fac090029e676e.png)

# A Fully Controller-Supported Modpack. 

### Thats right, play modded Minecraft with full controller support. Kick back on the sofa or lay in bed and jump right into the action.

Let's face it, Bedrock's controller input lag is horrible in its menus; crafting feels terrible, and the original smooth 4J Lecagy Editions of the game had a much better controller implementation. This modpack, with the help of Legacy4j Mod, brings smooth 4J Lecagy Editions controller support to the Java version of Minecraft.

What I have done is find and put together mods that support the custom UI of the Legacy4J mod, as not every mod works with this or the controller. 

Here is a full list of gameplay mods and what you can expect via the controller.

- Artefacts (Controller supported; toggle activate/deactivate item still needs mouse click)
- Botany Pots (full controller support)
- Botany Trees (full controller support)
- Camps. Csdtles. Carriages (full controller support)
- Energised Power (Full Controller Support)
- Double Doors (full controller support)
- Dark Paintings (full controller support)
- Chunk Loaders (Not Controller Supported: You must first disconnect your controller to place)
- Falling Tree (full controller support)
- Global XP (full controller support)
- Golden Age Combat (full controller support)
- Inventory Sorting (full controller support)
- Lootr (full controller support)
- Item Collectors (full controller support)
- Iron Chests (full controller support)
- Quartz Elevator (full controller support)
- Rechiseled (full controller support)
- Waystones (full controller support)
- WTHIT (full controller support)
- Veinminer (full controller support)
- Towns and Towers (full controller support)
- All Yungs better * Mods (full controller support)
- Recipe book changes to now have pages for each mod (full controller support)
- Farming for Blockheads (full controller support)
- Visuality to add visual effects to things (full controller support)
- Blockus - adds a ton of cosmetic blocks (full controller support)
- Earth2Java Mobs from Minecraft Earth have been added to the game (full controller support)
- Travelers backpacks (full controller support)
- Appleskin (full controller support)
- Croptopia (full controller support)
- The bumblezone (full controller support)


Just enough items (Not controller supported; you must use your mouse but do not need to disconnect the controller. However, if you want a JEI-like experience on a controller, use the Vanila crafting book and use the command "/recipe give [playername] *." This will unlock everything in the Vanila crafting book for you to use with a controller.)

The above list is just for gameplay mods. The modpack also holds a large amount of custom world-generated mods, such as Terrakith and more.












### This modpack would not be possible without the hard work of the team over at Legacy4j mod, send them your love <3 [https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j)

### If you are looking for a more faithfull legacy edition without mods check out Re-Console here [https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-minecraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-minecraft)

### The Devs over at Re-Console are fantastic send them your love too :)
